name: design-system
description: Standalone zero-JS HTML design-system reference: color swatches, a type scale, a spacing ruler, and a core-component gallery, all rendered with the shared design tokens. A portable reference to quote when prompting.

slots.description: Design-system title; used in <title> and the h1.
Header prose describing what the system was generated from.
Color swatches; each renders a .swatch with a colored chip, hex, and token name.
Type-scale rows; each renders a specimen with a name and size/line/weight meta.
Spacing-ruler tokens; each renders a bar sized to the value with a px + token label.
Core-component gallery; each renders a labeled stage holding a specimen.
Footer provenance line, auto-filled by the agent.
